# glitchtip_project (Data Source)

Reads an existing GlitchTip project by its `organization` and `slug`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "glitchtip_project" "example" {
  organization = "acme-inc"
  slug         = "api"
}

output "project_platform" {
  value = data.glitchtip_project.example.platform
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization` (String) Slug of the organization that owns the project.
- `slug` (String) URL-safe slug identifying the project within its organization.

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp at which the project was created.
- `event_throttle_rate` (Number) Probability (in percent) of events that are throttled at the project level.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the project.
- `name` (String) Human-readable name of the project.
- `platform` (String) Platform identifier for the project (for example `python` or `node`). Null when unset.
- `scrub_ip_addresses` (Boolean) Whether GlitchTip scrubs IP addresses from events for this project.
